# BAROM

> A calibrated automation-exposure score for IT consulting professionals.

BAROM computes a 0–100 score indicating automation exposure for roles at top global consulting firms and IT services companies. The score is deterministic, rule-based, and built on public data.

## What this site is

- Free 5-minute assessment producing a calibrated automation-exposure score
- Score based on role type, tech stack, experience level, geography, and AI tool use
- Three ranked pivot paths with salary deltas and timelines for each user
- Methodology fully documented and auditable

## Key URLs

- https://barom.ai — Landing page
- https://barom.ai/assessment — Take the free assessment
- https://barom.ai/methodology — Full model documentation
- https://barom.ai/pricing — Subscription pricing
- https://barom.ai/founding — Founding member application

## Data sources

Built on: earnings call transcripts, job posting velocity data (12M+ postings), restructuring filings, AI tooling adoption surveys, compensation signals.

18-month rolling window. Model version: v1.0 (April 2026).

## Editorial rules

- No individual company names in public commentary
- All claims cite public sources (SEC filings, earnings transcripts, press releases)
- No predictions framed as accusations
- Score is calibrated, not opinionated
